CustomField.description: This field is automatically checked the day after the "Application Due" date in order to trigger a process to create a removal case for the Campaign Owner of the property associated with this Service File.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is automatically checked the day after the "Application Due" date in order to trigger a process to create a removal case for the Campaign Owner of the property associated with this Service File.
CustomField.label: Create Full App Reminder Removal Case
